title: selaginella subrugosa
intro: Selaginella subrugosa is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection plant due to its ability to revive itself after dehydration. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have potential medicinal uses. The health benefits associated with Selaginella subrugosa include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, which is said to have various health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
